prompt: A vintage late-1970s Japanese crime film poster in the style of a Nikkatsu theatrical one-sheet, vertically composed on aged beige paper with visible grain, faint stains, and slightly faded ink. The main image is a large, moody half-body portrait of {argument name="lead actor name" default="原田芳雄"} occupying the upper right and center, turned partly away from camera, with thick curly dark hair, a serious expression, and a wrinkled light gray suit jacket over an open-collar white shirt; his face is mostly in shadow. Behind him is a bleak industrial waterfront with cranes, low factory structures, and heavy gray smoke rising into a washed-out sky. Across the lower middle, place a huge hand-brushed red Japanese title reading {argument name="title text" default="影の街"}, painted diagonally and aggressively, partially overlapping the portrait and the lower scene. In the lower half, add a second scene: a rainy urban street at dusk or night with wet reflective pavement, a dark police car at left with a glowing red roof light, and 6 men in suits and trench coats walking forward, with 1 central detective figure in a beige trench coat and loosened tie leading the group. On the far right, include a vertical strip of 5 stacked inset cast portraits framed in thin borders, each a dark cinematic still with different characters. Add vertical Japanese typography: on the upper right, the actor credit “原田芳雄 主演”; on the upper left, a 2-line tagline column reading “その男、刑事。 正義より、真実を追う。”; and near the lower right of the main image, another vertical blurb reading “誰が敵で、誰が味方か。闇に消えた事件の中で、ただひとつの真実を掴むまで—”. At the bottom, include dense small Japanese credits spanning the width, plus a large release date on the lower right reading {argument name="release date" default="11.23"} with “日活ロードショー” beneath it and a small studio mark. Use muted charcoal, sepia, smoky blue-gray, and off-white tones, with the red title as the only vivid color. The overall feeling is hard-boiled, melancholic, gritty, and cinematic, like a lost 1970s Japanese detective movie poster.
translatedPrompt: 一张 20 世纪 70 年代末的复古日本犯罪电影海报，采用日活（Nikkatsu）院线单张海报风格，纵向构图，背景为带有明显颗粒感、微弱污渍和墨迹褪色的米色旧纸张。主体图像是位于右上角和中心位置的 {argument name="lead actor name" default="原田芳雄"} 的大型忧郁半身肖像，他侧身背对镜头，留着浓密的深色卷发，表情严肃，身穿皱巴巴的浅灰色西装外套，内搭敞领白衬衫；面部大部分处于阴影中。背景是荒凉的工业码头，有起重机、低矮的工厂建筑和升入灰暗天空的浓重烟雾。在画面中下部，放置一个巨大的手写红色日文标题 {argument name="title text" default="影の街"}，以倾斜且强烈的笔触书写，部分覆盖了肖像和下方场景。在下半部分，添加第二个场景：黄昏或夜晚雨中的城市街道，路面湿润且带有倒影，左侧是一辆车顶红灯闪烁的深色警车，6 名身穿西装和风衣的男子正向前走，其中 1 名身穿米色风衣、领带松散的侦探形象走在队伍最前方。在最右侧，包含一列垂直排列的 5 张嵌入式演员肖像，每张都带有细边框，呈现出不同角色的深沉电影剧照。添加垂直日文排版：右上角为演员表“原田芳雄 主演”；左上角为两行标语“その男、刑事。 正義より、真実を追う。”；在主体图像右下角附近，添加另一段垂直宣传语“誰が敵で、誰が味方か。闇に消えた事件の中で、ただひとつの真実を掴むまで—”。底部包含横跨整个宽度的密集小字日文演职员表，右下角标注醒目的上映日期 {argument name="release date" default="11.23"}，下方印有“日活ロードショー”字样及小型制片厂标志。色调采用柔和的炭灰色、深褐色、烟雾蓝灰色和灰白色，红色标题是唯一的鲜艳色彩。整体氛围硬派、忧郁、粗粝且充满电影感，宛如一张失传的 1970 年代日本侦探电影海报。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古日本犯罪电影海报：一张粗粝的复古日本电影院线海报，适用于生成具有 1970 年代风格、排版和布局考究的电影主视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, vintage, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
